from sqlalchemy.orm import Session

def transfer_funds(session: Session, from_id: int, to_id: int, amount: float):
    try:
        session.begin()
        from_account = session.query(Account).filter_by(id=from_id).one()
        to_account = session.query(Account).filter_by(id=to_id).one()
        from_account.balance -= amount
        to_account.balance += amount
        session.commit()
    except Exception:
        session.rollback()
        raise

def create_order_with_items(session: Session, order_data: dict, items: list):
    try:
        session.begin()
        order = Order(**order_data)
        session.add(order)
        for item_data in items:
            item = OrderItem(order_id=order.id, **item_data)
            session.add(item)
        session.commit()
    except Exception:
        session.rollback()
        raise

def update_user_and_log(session: Session, user_id: int, changes: dict):
    try:
        tx = session.begin()
        user = session.query(User).filter_by(id=user_id).one()
        for key, value in changes.items():
            setattr(user, key, value)
        log = AuditLog(user_id=user_id, changes=changes)
        session.add(log)
        tx.commit()
    except Exception:
        session.rollback()
        raise
